description_long: This is a classical-style stone fountain sculpture featuring a standing human figure atop a tall, ornate pedestal. The pedestal is octagonal and decorated with reliefs and lion head motifs, each of which serves as a spout for water to flow into the surrounding basins. The base is multi-tiered, with a wide, angular platform that collects water and provides structural stability. The human figure appears draped in flowing garments, holding an object in one hand, and stands in a dignified pose. The entire structure is rendered in a light gray stone, giving it a monumental and historic appearance. The sculpture is likely intended as a decorative centerpiece for a public space such as a plaza or park.
description: A classical stone fountain sculpture with a draped human figure atop an ornate pedestal, featuring lion head water spouts and a wide octagonal base. The structure is detailed and monumental, suitable for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the human figure facing forward, with the most prominent lion head spout and basin visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the figure and pedestal, with less decorative detail and no visible spout.
description_view_2: Side view displaying one of the lateral lion head spouts and the profile of the figure and pedestal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another lion head spout and a partial profile of the figure, showing the draped garment from a different angle.
attribute_subject_matter: draped human figure atop a decorative fountain pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears suited for an outdoor urban plaza or park, as suggested by its fountain design and monumental scale.
